turns.text: Thanks for calling Sears Home Services — what appliance can I help you with today?
Hi, my dryer is acting up.
Got it — a dryer. What's the brand and model, and what's happening?
Thanks. Can you tell me more about what's happening and when it started?
Runs a full cycle but clothes take two rounds to dry, for about a week.
Understood, and any error codes or unusual sounds?
No error code or unusual sound, just that.
Here's what I'd try: double check the dryer isn't overloaded and the settings match the load, then run a quick cycle to confirm the fix worked.
Happy to help — call back anytime if it's still acting up!

symptoms.description: runs a full cycle but clothes take two rounds to dry

steps_given: Double check the dryer isn't overloaded and the settings match the load.
Run a quick diagnostic cycle to confirm the fix worked.
